steps.t: Cadi has asked you to collect beech nuts around Wylvenclove, north-west of Herne.
You have collected a number of beech nuts for Cadi. She waits in Rendal's home in the south-west corner of Herne.
You should help Cadi harvest seeds from the beech nuts.
The beech seeds have been harvested. You should talk to Cadi.
